MrTreasuresFortunePaytableRule.Rule1: Mr. Treasure's Fortune is a 3-reel, 3-row video slot featuring symbols with multipliers up to x100.

Rule2.value: The game is played with 10 base bet (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
Rule2.comment: Both %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced by the currency symbol, do not translate. Both %{20} and %{400} will be formatted accordingly, do not translate.
Rule2.example: The game is played with 10 base bet (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.1 to 10.

MrTreasuresFortunePaytableRule.Rule3: A combination win in cash is equal to the value shown in the Paytable multiplied by the bet size and bet multiplier.
MrTreasuresFortunePaytableRule.Rule4: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.

MrTreasuresFortunePaytableShare.PayoutDesc1: At every spin, any combinations of 3 or more symbols touching horizontally or vertically will result in a winning combination.
MrTreasuresFortunePaytableShare.PayoutDesc2: Winning combinations and payouts are made according to the "Paytable".
MrTreasuresFortunePaytableShare.PayoutDesc3: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode, allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
MrTreasuresFortunePaytableShare.PayoutDesc4: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
MrTreasuresFortunePaytableShare.SymbolMultiplierDesc1: During any spin, symbols with multipliers ranging from x2 to x100 may appear on the reels.
MrTreasuresFortunePaytableShare.SymbolMultiplierDesc2: If 1 or more symbols with multipliers are involved in a win, the win for that round will be multiplied by the total multiplier from the winning symbol(s).
MrTreasuresFortunePaytableShare.SymbolMultiplierDesc3: After wins are paid, the total multiplier will remain at the top of the reels. Subsequent winning symbol(s) with multiplier will increase the total multiplier until the end of the spin.
MrTreasuresFortunePaytableShare.FreeSpinFeatureDesc1: During any spin, the Free Spins Feature with 10 Free Spins may be randomly triggered while the reels are spinning.
MrTreasuresFortunePaytableShare.FreeSpinFeatureDesc2: At the start of Free Spins Feature, the multiplier is x2.
MrTreasuresFortunePaytableShare.FreeSpinFeatureDesc3: Any multipliers collected during any free spin will be accumulated and will remain at the top of the reels until the end of the Free Spins Feature.
MrTreasuresFortunePaytableShare.MaximumWinDesc1: The maximum win amount is %{5000}x of the bet amount.
MrTreasuresFortunePaytableShare.MaximumWinDesc2: If the total win in the main game or the Free Spins Feature reaches %{5000}x of the bet amount, the spin ends.
